goal: 给 Catty dogfood health 增加真实/Stub 样本质量分解

summary.title: 增加 dogfood 样本质量分解
summary.what: 在 Catty v0 DailyReport 中新增 sourceQuality，只读聚合 predictionSources、judgementSources、stub/model/other source kind、judged sample kind、lowScoreMisses 和 highScoreModelSamples。dogfood-health summary 透传这组质量分解，并在 no_user_prior_candidates blocker 里解释当前没有 user-prior candidate 的具体原因：低分 miss 来自 Stub/prediction-eval，真实 model 样本不是低分 miss。
summary.why: 当前 live dogfood report 显示 total=3、judged=3，但其中 2 条是 Stub/StubJudge 低分 prediction-eval，1 条是 Pi/PiJudge 高分样本。没有 source/quality breakdown 时，后续 agent 容易把 judged 总数误读成足够真实 dogfood 证据，或误判 no_user_prior_candidates 是链路坏了。本轮让 report/health 直接暴露样本来源和低分 miss 归属，减少 Goodhart 和 memory admission 污染风险。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty dogfood health 增加真实/Stub 样本质量分解

decisions.chose: 放进 runtime.generateDailyReport 返回的 DailyReport.sourceQuality，并由 dogfood-health summary 透传。
decisions.rationale: report 是 v0 反漂移审计面的单一口径；dogfood-health 已经组合 report/candidate/canary 状态，透传即可避免再建一套指标定义。

decisions.chose: 同时保留精确 source 计数和 stub/model/other 归类。
decisions.rationale: 精确 source 能看见 stub、stub-judge、pi:cliproxy/gpt-5.4-mini、pi-judge:cliproxy/gpt-5.4-mini；归类则让 health 能直接解释低分样本是不是 Stub eval，而不是只看总数。

decisions.chose: 在 blocker reason 中追加低分样本归因，而不是改变 memory-candidates 的 admission 逻辑。
decisions.rationale: 当前剩余 blocker 是预期状态，不是 candidate 链路坏；低分 Stub eval 不能转 user-prior，Pi 高分样本也不该被强行变成 miss。

decisions.chose: 把 report、dogfood-health、memory-candidates、本地日期、busy-timeout 相关 proposed overlaps 视为同一 catty 分支上的顺序补全。
decisions.rationale: 本轮只增加只读质量分解，不改变 shadow/judge/canary/accepted-memory 协议，也不触碰无关 CLAUDE.md。

rejected.alternative: 把 Pi 高分样本也算成 memory candidate 进度
rejected.reason: v0 memory admission 只应从可证伪 judged miss 产生 user-prior candidate；高分样本是 dogfood 证据，不是待修正 miss。

rejected.alternative: 在 dogfood-health 中重写 candidate selection 或降低 no_user_prior_candidates blocker
rejected.reason: 这会掩盖当前真实状态；本轮目标是可诊断性，不是让 readiness 看起来更绿。

rejected.alternative: 写入 catty_memory_audit、user memory 或 canary state 来记录 breakdown
rejected.reason: sourceQuality 是只读 report 派生值；写入会越过本轮边界并污染 memory/canary 协议。

review_notes: TDD RED：bun test src/catty/report.test.ts src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts 先失败于 sourceQuality 不存在。
Focused GREEN：bun test src/catty/report.test.ts src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts，8 pass，50 expect。
Catty focused 验证：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，71 pass，455 expect。
全量验证：bun test，76 pass，469 expect。
Diff hygiene：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 均通过。

Live report smoke：bun src/catty/report.ts --date $(date +%F) 显示 predictionSources stub=2、pi:cliproxy/gpt-5.4-mini=1，judgementSources stub-judge=2、pi-judge:cliproxy/gpt-5.4-mini=1，lowScoreMisses.stubEval=2，highScoreModelSamples=1。
Live dogfood-health smoke：no_user_prior_candidates reason 现在说明 low-score misses are Stub/prediction-eval only; model samples are not low-score misses。
Runtime live status：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 返回 ok=true，observe OK，full pipeline 正常 throttled；heartbeat.out.log 尾部的 locked 是并发手动检查产生的跳过记录，heartbeat.err.log 为空。
提交 385fd29 只包含 src/catty/runtime.ts、src/catty/dogfood-health.ts、src/catty/report.test.ts、src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts；CLAUDE.md 仍是无关 unstaged dirty。

subsystems: Catty v0 daily report source quality
Catty v0 dogfood health readiness diagnostics
architectural_claims: DailyReport now exposes sourceQuality as a derived read-only audit field over existing prediction and judgement records.
Dogfood health now reuses the report-level sourceQuality instead of recomputing source metrics independently.
Sample quality is diagnosed separately from memory admission; Stub eval data remains prediction-eval and is not promoted to user-prior memory.
The change does not alter shadow prediction, judge writeback, memory candidate generation, canary planning, accepted-memory writing, heartbeat, or model-call boundaries.
behavioral_changes: Persisted report JSON includes sourceQuality.predictionSources and sourceQuality.judgementSources with exact source names.
Persisted report JSON includes sourceQuality.predictions and sourceQuality.judgements split into stub/model/other counts.
Persisted report JSON includes sourceQuality.lowScoreMisses split into stubEval, modelMisses, and mixedOrOther.
Persisted report JSON includes sourceQuality.highScoreModelSamples for model-backed judged samples scoring at or above the miss threshold.
Dogfood health summary now includes the report sourceQuality field.
When no user-prior candidates exist, dogfood-health can explain that low-score misses are Stub/prediction-eval only and model samples are not low-score misses.

api_changes.signature: src/catty/runtime.ts: generateDailyReport(...): DailyReport now includes sourceQuality
bun src/catty/report.ts output JSON now includes report.sourceQuality
bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts output JSON now includes summary.sourceQuality and richer no_user_prior_candidates reason

security_implications: No secrets, API keys, cookies, or ~/.agents/memory/config.json are read.
No model provider calls are added.
No user memory, catty_memory_audit, catty_memory_canaries, or prediction records are written by this reporting change.
migration_notes: No SQLite schema migration is required; sourceQuality is computed from existing hypothesis_json and judgement_json fields.
Existing report and dogfood-health consumers remain compatible unless they require exact JSON equality without allowing additional fields.
